_comment_edit_ngam: Set to true to set NGAM (ATPM) lower bound to 0 during optimization
_comment_enable_maintenance_sweep: Set to true to run NGAM/GAM parameter sweep
_comment_biomass_constraint: This config is for FVA without biomass constraint - use with --no-biomass-constraint flag

fva._comment_method: Use dask for better task scheduling and monitoring - verified working in SLURM
fva._comment_workers: Set to match SLURM_CPUS_PER_TASK for optimal performance
fva._comment_chunk_size: Number of reactions per task. Smaller chunks = better memory efficiency
fva._comment_no_biomass: Biomass will NOT be constrained during FVA - allows exploration of full flux space

simulated_annealing._comment_aggressive: AGGRESSIVE SETTINGS - larger perturbations and longer search
simulated_annealing._comment_temperature: High starting temp (100) for large initial exploration
simulated_annealing._comment_n_top_enzymes: Tune top 500 enzymes for sufficient optimization flexibility
